untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe pattern analysis (daily pullback/consolidation + weekly impulse confirmation) which cannot be expressed using single-timeframe indicators. Requires explicit pattern detection logic for 'clean pullback', 'consolidation pattern', 'completed impulse move', and 'first reaction bounce' that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The timeframe_ratio parameter is undefined ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]). Source text is incomplete/truncated.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using ADX for trend confirmation and SMA crossovers for directional alignment, but this does NOT capture the core multi-timeframe pattern confirmation requirement. A proper implementation requires: (1) explicit pattern recognition functions for lower-timeframe consolidations, (2) multi-timeframe data alignment, (3) impulse move completion detection on weekly chart, (4) defined threshold for timeframe_ratio. Current translation is a simplified approximation only.
